quality_notes: Single-shot Sonnet 4.6 should produce a usable doc-audit report, but for reviewer-class work it is likely to catch fewer subtle cross-page consistency issues than Opus 4.7. Sonnet 4.6 scores about 75% on medium-difficulty SWE-bench Verified versus Opus 4.7 at about 79%, so expect competent per-page findings with somewhat shallower synthesis across the 11-page corpus.
